name: Loguetown
aliases: Town of the Beginning and End
description: Loguetown is a large port town in East Blue, famous as both the birthplace and execution site of the Pirate King, Gol D. Roger. Known as the 'Town of the Beginning and End,' it's the last stop for pirates before entering the Grand Line. The execution platform where Roger died still stands in the town square, drawing both pirates seeking inspiration and Marines seeking to stop them.
history: Loguetown gained eternal fame when Gol D. Roger, born there, returned to be publicly executed after surrendering to the Marines. His final words sparked the Great Age of Pirates. Since then, the town has been a crucial Marine outpost, heavily guarded to prevent pirates from using it as a staging ground. Captain Smoker was stationed there specifically to stop pirates before they reached the Grand Line. When Luffy visited to see where Roger died, Buggy and Alvida attempted public execution, but Luffy was saved by a mysterious figure (Dragon) and escaped to the Grand Line.
culture: Loguetown's culture is defined by its connection to Roger. Pirates treat it as a pilgrimage site, while Marines see it as their last chance to stop criminals. The town is split between those who profit from pirate traffic and those who fear it. Weapon shops, supply stores, and Marine checkpoints dominate the streets. Civilians live uneasily, knowing their town marks the dividing line between the known and the unknown.
transportation: Major port with heavy ship traffic. Marines patrol constantly. The town has well-maintained streets for commercial carts and military patrols. The execution platform is visible from most of the town.

traditions: Bar gatherings for pirates and merchants
Quick meals before Grand Line departure
quirks: Restaurants catering to 'last meals' before Grand Line

notablePeople.name: Smoker
notablePeople.description: The gruff, cigar-smoking Marine with the Smoke-Smoke Fruit. Stationed in Loguetown to stop pirates before the Grand Line. Pursues Luffy into the Grand Line.

notablePeople.name: Tashigi
notablePeople.role: Marine Master Chief Petty Officer / Swordswoman
notablePeople.description: Smoker's sword-collecting subordinate who bears an uncanny resemblance to Zoro's deceased friend Kuina.

notablePeople.name: Monkey D. Dragon
notablePeople.description: The mysterious leader of the Revolutionary Army who saved Luffy from execution. Revealed as his father.

notablePeople.name: Buggy the Clown
notablePeople.description: Returns to Loguetown seeking revenge on Luffy. Attempts to execute him on the same platform where Roger died.

notablePeople.name: Alvida
notablePeople.description: Returns as Buggy's ally after eating the Smooth-Smooth Fruit, completely transformed in appearance.

notablePeople.name: Ipponmatsu
notablePeople.description: The kind weapon shop owner who gave Zoro the cursed Sandai Kitetsu and the heirloom Yubashiri for free.

subLocations.name: Execution Platform
subLocations.description: The infamous platform where Gol D. Roger was executed, sparking the Great Age of Pirates. Where Buggy tried to execute Luffy.
notableFeatures: Where Roger's final words were spoken

subLocations.name: Weapons Shop
subLocations.description: Ipponmatsu's shop where Zoro acquired Sandai Kitetsu (cursed) and Yubashiri.
notableFeatures: Where Zoro gained two legendary swords

subLocations.name: Marine Base
subLocations.description: Smoker's headquarters, heavily fortified to prevent pirates from reaching the Grand Line.

subLocations.name: Port District
subLocations.description: The busy docks where ships depart for the Grand Line, heavily monitored by Marines.

subLocations.name: Town Square
subLocations.description: The central plaza dominated by the execution platform, where the final battle occurred.

items.name: Sandai Kitetsu
items.description: One of the Kitetsu cursed blades. Zoro won against its curse and claimed it.

items.name: Yubashiri
items.description: A skillful grade sword given to Zoro by Ipponmatsu. Later destroyed at Enies Lobby.

items.name: Execution Platform
items.description: The platform itself is an artifact of history, representing the beginning of the pirate age.

items.name: Smoker's Jitte
items.description: Smoker's jutte weapon tipped with Seastone, effective against Devil Fruit users.

factions.name: Loguetown Marines
factions.description: Marines specifically stationed to prevent pirates from reaching the Grand Line.

factions.name: Loguetown Citizens
factions.description: Townsfolk living in the shadow of Roger's legacy, profiting from and fearing pirates.

factions.name: Buggy-Alvida Alliance
factions.description: Temporary alliance formed to take revenge on Luffy.

events: Straw Hats arrive for final preparations
Zoro visits weapon shop and acquires new swords
Buggy attempts to execute Luffy on the platform
Dragon revealed as Luffy's father (to audience)
Mysterious storm aids Straw Hats' escape
Smoker decides to pursue Luffy into Grand Line
Straw Hats depart for the Grand Line

quickFacts: Where Gol D. Roger was born and executed
Last stop before the Grand Line
Where Luffy was saved by Dragon (his father)
Where Zoro got Sandai Kitetsu and Yubashiri
Site of Roger's legendary final words
Gateway between East Blue and the Grand Line

videos.title: Dragon Saves Luffy
videos.description: The mysterious moment when Monkey D. Dragon intervenes to save his son.

videos.title: Luffy finds an old bar that Gol D roger visited
videos.description: Luffy finds a bar Gol D Roger visited before his execution

music.title: Departure Of The King Of The Pirates
